creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Since NDEBUG is not a commonly used option and this issue has never 
come up before; and since the windowmaker project is back in action 
I'd suggest that you submit this patch upstream first. 

Please indicate if you agree and that this PR can be closed. 

Thanks for bringing this to my attention, 

Doug
